description: Model must call the CMS page fetch tool with a slug derived from the page title mentioned in the prompt. Tests slug inference from a human-readable title and correct optional locale parameter handling.
prompt: Fetch the CMS page for 'Getting Started with the API'. The locale should be British English (en-GB). Use the fetch_page tool.

toolDefinitions.name: fetch_page
toolDefinitions.description: Retrieves a CMS page by its URL slug. Returns the full page content and metadata.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale code for localised content, e.g. 'en-GB'. Defaults to 'en-US' if omitted.
